text.title: Mobile Performance Budget Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 antipatterns observed in real perf-budget rollouts.

antipattern.symptom: Marketing pages restricted by tight checkout-page budget; pages can't add hero video; product complains.
antipattern.root-cause: One global budget across all routes ignored route-specific needs.
antipattern.fix: Split budget per route group: landing (richer media), product (image-heavy), checkout (interaction-heavy, smaller JS); each with own thresholds.

antipattern.symptom: Documented budget exists; LCP slowly creeps from 1.8s → 3.5s over 6 months.
antipattern.root-cause: Budget is a markdown doc; no CI step blocks regressions.
antipattern.fix: Add Lighthouse CI to GH Actions: budget JSON in repo; PR fails if budget exceeded. Alternative: bundle-size action for size-only check.

antipattern.symptom: Lighthouse green in CI; CrUX shows mobile p75 LCP 5s in production.
antipattern.root-cause: CI runs Lighthouse on desktop preset; mobile reality untested.
antipattern.fix: Switch CI Lighthouse config to mobile (--preset=mobile or matching emulation flags); validate against mobile thresholds.

antipattern.symptom: Budget hasn't been touched in 2 years; product has added 4 major features; budget is silently violated everywhere.
antipattern.root-cause: No review cadence; budget treated as set-and-forget.
antipattern.fix: Add quarterly perf review calendar; require written rationale for each budget change.
